name: memory-backend
description: Implement MemoryBackend for in-memory filtering of MST collections using @ucast/js
acceptanceCriteria: CRITICAL: Uses interpret(ast, item) pattern, NOT interpret(ast)(item)
Custom $contains interpreter handles string.includes() and array.includes()
Implements pagination via array slice() for skip/take
capabilities property declares all supported operators
Returns same MST references (not cloned objects)
